Package noppes.npcs.api.handler.data

Interface IAuctionClaim

  • public interface IAuctionClaim
    Represents an auction claim (item or currency to be collected).

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      long getCreatedTime()
      Get when this claim was created (Unix timestamp in ms).
      long getCurrency()
      Get the currency amount (for currency/refund claims).
      long getDaysUntilExpiration()
      Get days until this claim expires.
      String getId()
      Get the unique claim ID.
      IItemStack getItem()
      Get the item to claim (for item claims only).
      String getItemName()
      Get the item display name (for currency/refund claims tooltip).
      String getListingId()
      Get the related listing ID.
      String getOtherPlayerName()
      Get the other player's name involved.
      String getPlayerName()
      Get the player's display name.
      String getPlayerUUID()
      Get the player's UUID who can claim this.
      int getType()
      Get the claim type.
      boolean isClaimed()
      Check if this claim has been claimed.
      boolean isCurrencyClaim()
      Check if this is a currency claim (sale proceeds or refund).
      boolean isExpired()
      Check if this claim has expired.
      boolean isItemClaim()
      Check if this is an item claim.
      boolean isRefundClaim()
      Check if this is a refund claim (outbid).
      boolean isReturnedItem()
      Check if this is a returned item (expired/cancelled listing) vs won item.

    • Method Detail

      • getId

        String getId()
        Get the unique claim ID.
        Returns:
        the unique claim ID

      • getPlayerUUID

        String getPlayerUUID()
        Get the player's UUID who can claim this.
        Returns:
        the UUID of the player who can claim this

      • getPlayerName

        String getPlayerName()
        Get the player's display name.
        Returns:
        the name of the player who can claim this

      • getListingId

        String getListingId()
        Get the related listing ID.
        Returns:
        the ID of the original auction listing

      • getType

        int getType()
        Get the claim type.
        Returns:
        0 = Item, 1 = Currency (sale proceeds), 2 = Refund (outbid)

      • isItemClaim

        boolean isItemClaim()
        Check if this is an item claim.
        Returns:
        true if this claim contains an item to collect

      • isCurrencyClaim

        boolean isCurrencyClaim()
        Check if this is a currency claim (sale proceeds or refund).
        Returns:
        true if this claim contains currency to collect

      • isRefundClaim

        boolean isRefundClaim()
        Check if this is a refund claim (outbid).
        Returns:
        true if this is a refund from an outbid or cancelled auction

      • getItem

        IItemStack getItem()
        Get the item to claim (for item claims only).
        Returns:
        The item, or null for currency claims

      • getItemName

        String getItemName()
        Get the item display name (for currency/refund claims tooltip).
        Returns:
        the display name of the claimed item

      • getCurrency

        long getCurrency()
        Get the currency amount (for currency/refund claims).
        Returns:
        the currency amount to claim

      • getOtherPlayerName

        String getOtherPlayerName()
        Get the other player's name involved. For currency claims: the buyer's name. For refund claims: the player who outbid.
        Returns:
        the name of the other party in the transaction

      • getCreatedTime

        long getCreatedTime()
        Get when this claim was created (Unix timestamp in ms).
        Returns:
        the timestamp when this claim was created

      • isClaimed

        boolean isClaimed()
        Check if this claim has been claimed.
        Returns:
        true if this claim has already been collected

      • isReturnedItem

        boolean isReturnedItem()
        Check if this is a returned item (expired/cancelled listing) vs won item. Only relevant for item claims.
        Returns:
        true if this is a returned unsold item

      • getDaysUntilExpiration

        long getDaysUntilExpiration()
        Get days until this claim expires.
        Returns:
        the number of days until this claim expires

      • isExpired

        boolean isExpired()
        Check if this claim has expired.
        Returns:
        true if this claim has expired
